get.description: Returns correlation summaries for a host since the provided timestamp.

parameters.description: RFC3339 timestamp upper bound (defaults to now)
parameters.name: until

get.description: Returns heuristic alerts for a host since the provided timestamp.

parameters.description: RFC3339 timestamp upper bound (defaults to now)
parameters.name: until

get.description: Returns distinct hosts observed in process telemetry.
Returns individual lifecycle events for a host since the provided timestamp.

parameters.description: RFC3339 timestamp upper bound (defaults to now)
parameters.name: until

get.description: Returns process HTTP events for a host since the provided timestamp.

parameters.description: RFC3339 timestamp upper bound (defaults to now)
parameters.name: until

get.description: Returns aggregated metadata and recent alerts for a specific process root.
Returns a hierarchical process tree for the most recent roots on a host.

parameters.description: Specific root exec id to expand
parameters.name: root_exec_id

get.description: Returns the HTTP request payload associated with a prompt injection request ID.
get.summary: Get stored HTTP request for a prompt injection

get.description: Returns LLM security analysis records and prompt injection summaries for a host.
get.summary: List security semantic and prompt injection analysis

post.description: Accepts a batch of process execution telemetry events for bulk ingestion.
Accepts a batch of HTTP request telemetry events for bulk ingestion.
Accepts a batch of HTTP response telemetry events for bulk ingestion.
Accepts MCP JSON-RPC events captured from STDIO transports.
